panels.description: Worker FastAPI service responding to /metrics. If 0, the content pipeline is offline.
panels.title: Worker

panels.description: Postgres reachable via the local-brain-db datasource. If 0 the dashboard itself would fail — this is a belt+suspenders sanity check.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 1 AS "Postgres";

panels.title: Postgres

panels.description: nvidia-smi exporter. Missing = GPU not detected, degraded, or exporter down.
panels.title: GPU exporter

panels.description: Pyroscope profiling server. Non-critical (profiling is best-effort).
panels.title: Pyroscope

panels.description: Tempo traces backend.
panels.title: Tempo

panels.description: Uptime-kuma external health monitor.
panels.title: Uptime-kuma

panels.description: Content tasks created in the last 24h. Zero for extended periods means autonomous topic generation has stalled.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Tasks (24h)" FROM content_tasks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

panels.title: Tasks in 24h

panels.description: Approval rate over last 24h. Controlled test batches (CTS-v1, post-whitelist) run 70-90%. Autonomous topic-discovery baseline is lower (10-30%) because the idle worker re-queues topics that keep tripping real-quality vetoes. Threshold targets the autonomous baseline — bump to 40% green once topic-discovery dedup (GH-101) ships.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('awaiting_approval','approved','published'))::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('rejected','awaiting_approval','approved','published')), 0), 1) AS "Approval %" FROM content_tasks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

panels.title: Approval rate (24h)

panels.description: Approval queue fill % vs max_approval_queue setting. When this hits 100, new generation throttles until you review.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_tasks WHERE status='awaiting_approval')::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT value::int FROM app_settings WHERE key='max_approval_queue'), 0), 0) AS "Queue % of cap";

panels.title: Approval queue fill

panels.description: Tasks stuck in_progress longer than 30 minutes. Should be 0. Anything >0 means a stage hung — see docs/operations/troubleshooting.md.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Stuck tasks" FROM content_tasks WHERE status='in_progress' AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes';

panels.title: Stuck in_progress >30m

panels.description: Posts published in the last 7 days. Healthy cadence is 1-3 per day.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Published (7d)" FROM posts WHERE status='published' AND published_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';

panels.title: Published (7d)

panels.description: Hours since the most recent publish. Green if <48h, yellow 48h-7d, red >7d.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(published_at)))/3600 AS "Hours since publish" FROM posts WHERE status='published';

panels.title: Hours since last publish

panels.description: Hours since the backfill_podcasts job last ran. The scheduler runs it every 4 hours — green <6h, yellow <24h, red >24h (scheduler may be stuck). media_assets-backed coverage % was removed because backfill jobs write to R2 directly, not that table.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - to_timestamp(value::float8))) / 3600, 1) AS "Hours ago" FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'idle_last_run_podcast_backfill';

panels.title: Podcast backfill last run

panels.description: Hours since the backfill_videos job last ran. Scheduler runs every 6 hours — green <8h, yellow <24h, red >24h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - to_timestamp(value::float8))) / 3600, 1) AS "Hours ago" FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'idle_last_run_video_backfill';

panels.title: Video backfill last run

panels.description: Total embedding rows. Above 100k should trigger the collapse_old_embeddings job — see GH-106.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Embeddings" FROM embeddings;

panels.title: Embeddings rows

panels.description: Total embeddings table size in MB.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (pg_total_relation_size('embeddings') / 1024.0 / 1024.0) AS "MB";

panels.title: Embeddings size

panels.description: Age of the oldest embedding in days. Extremely old rows may be candidates for retention-policy pruning.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(created_at)))/86400 AS "Days" FROM embeddings;

panels.title: Oldest embedding (days)

panels.description: 24h cost across cost_logs — electricity for running the 24/7 stack + amortized GPU inference cost + any cloud LLM calls. Baseline on Matt's 5090 stack is ~$1.50/day (system electricity at 120W + inference peaks). Red threshold targets unexpected cloud-API spend.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS "Cost 24h" FROM cost_logs WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

panels.title: Ops cost (24h)

panels.description: Alerts firing (not resolved) in the last hour. Each row in alert_events with status='firing' is one Alertmanager fire event.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Firing (1h)" FROM alert_events WHERE status='firing' AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';

panels.title: Alerts firing (1h)

panels.description: Rate of validator hallucination warnings per minute. High-rate spikes indicate a writer-model regression or a new edge-case class.
panels.title: Validator warnings (15m rate)

panels.description: Count of is_secret=true app_settings rows that are stored as PLAINTEXT (not encrypted at rest). Should be 0 — any row with is_secret=true should be encrypted with pgcrypto via plugins/secrets. Non-zero means a secret is stored in the clear and should be re-encrypted.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Plaintext secrets" FROM app_settings WHERE is_secret = true AND value != '' AND value NOT LIKE 'enc:v1:%';

panels.title: Plaintext secrets (should be 0)

panels.description: Tasks rejected in the last 24h by a hard veto (citation_verifier / programmatic_validator / topic_delivery). Thresholds are calibrated to the autonomous topic-discovery baseline — expect 5-20/day during normal operation. Red only if the number suggests a regression (a new false-positive class is in play).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Hard rejects (24h)" FROM content_tasks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND status = 'rejected' AND (error_message ILIKE '%veto: programmatic_validator%' OR error_message ILIKE '%veto: citation_verifier%' OR error_message ILIKE '%veto: topic_delivery%');

panels.title: Hard rejects (24h)

panels.description: Last-run timestamp (age in hours) for each idle-tracked background job. Red = overdue given its interval; investigate the scheduler.

targets.rawSql: SELECT key AS "Job", value::float8 AS "Last-run (unix ts)", to_timestamp(value::float8)::timestamptz AS "Last-run", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - to_timestamp(value::float8))) / 3600, 1) AS "Hours ago" FROM app_settings WHERE key LIKE 'idle_last_run_%' ORDER BY value::float8 ASC;

panels.title: Scheduled jobs — last run times
Infrastructure Detail (Postgres / Hardware / Audit / Data / Settings)

targets.rawSql: SELECT pg_database_size(current_database()) as db_size_bytes
SELECT COUNT(*) as active_connections FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT COALESCE(state, 'unknown') as state, COUNT(*) as count FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database() GROUP BY state
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - backend_start))), 0) as max_conn_age_seconds FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT schemaname, relname as table_name, n_live_tup as estimated_rows, n_dead_tup as dead_rows, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum, last_analyze FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY n_live_tup DESC
SELECT relname as table_name, pg_total_relation_size(quote_ident(relname)) as total_size_bytes FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY total_size_bytes DESC

SELECT relname as table_name, idx_scan as index_scans, seq_scan as sequential_scans, (idx_scan + seq_scan) as total_scans, CASE WHEN (idx_scan + seq_scan) > 0 THEN ROUND(idx_scan * 100.0 / (idx_scan + seq_scan), 1) ELSE 0 END as idx_scan_pct FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE (idx_scan + seq_scan) > 0 ORDER BY total_scans DESC

SELECT pid, usename, state, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - query_start)) as duration_seconds, LEFT(query, 200) as query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database() AND state != 'idle' AND pid != pg_backend_pid() ORDER BY query_start ASC
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(blks_hit) / NULLIF(SUM(blks_hit) + SUM(blks_read), 0), 2) as cache_hit_ratio FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT xact_commit as committed, xact_rollback as rolled_back FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT relname as table_name, n_dead_tup as dead_tuples FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE n_dead_tup > 0 ORDER BY n_dead_tup DESC

options.content: **Real-time metrics from nvidia-smi exporter + Poindexter worker.**

targets.rawSql: SELECT utilization FROM gpu_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temperature FROM gpu_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_draw FROM gpu_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(((memory_used/NULLIF(memory_total,0))*100)::numeric,1) FROM gpu_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT to_char("timestamp",'HH24:MI') as sample_time, utilization as util, temperature as temp, ROUND(power_draw::numeric) as watts, memory_used as vram, fan_speed as fan, clock_graphics as clock FROM gpu_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date_trunc('day',"timestamp")::date as day, ROUND(AVG(utilization)::numeric,1) as util, ROUND(AVG(temperature)::numeric,1) as temp, ROUND(AVG(power_draw)::numeric) as watts, COUNT(*) as samples FROM gpu_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC

panels.title: Gaming Detected
panels.description: Pipeline pauses automatically when external GPU workload (gaming) is detected

panels.title: Gaming Detection & Pipeline Status
panels.description: Shows when gaming pauses the pipeline vs active GPU usage

panels.title: Total Gaming Pause
panels.description: Cumulative time pipeline has been paused for gaming since worker start

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE severity='error' AND $__timeFilter("timestamp")
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT source) FROM audit_log WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) FROM audit_log WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter("timestamp")
SELECT severity as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM audit_log WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT source as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM audit_log WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT event_type as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM audit_log WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT id, to_char("timestamp",'MM-DD HH24:MI') as event_time, event_type, source, task_id, severity, LEFT(details::text,100) as details FROM audit_log WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT to_char("timestamp",'MM-DD HH24:MI') as event_time, event_type, source, LEFT(details::text,120) as details FROM audit_log WHERE severity='error' AND $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT LEFT(topic, 50) as topic, status, quality_score, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT LEFT(title, 50) as title, slug, published_at::date FROM posts WHERE status='published' AND $__timeFilter(published_at) ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT model, provider, ROUND(cost_usd::numeric, 6) as cost, total_tokens, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM cost_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT entity, attribute, LEFT(value::text, 60) as value, confidence, updated_at::timestamp(0) FROM brain_knowledge WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT LEFT(decision, 30) as type, LEFT(reasoning, 80) as reasoning, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM brain_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT key, LEFT(value, 40) as value, category FROM app_settings WHERE is_secret = false ORDER BY category, key
SELECT path, referrer, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM page_views WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT LEFT(content_id, 12) as content_id, ROUND(overall_score::numeric, 1) as score, ROUND(clarity::numeric, 1) as clarity, ROUND(accuracy::numeric, 1) as accuracy, ROUND(completeness::numeric, 1) as completeness, evaluation_timestamp::timestamp(0) FROM quality_evaluations WHERE $__timeFilter(evaluation_timestamp) ORDER BY evaluation_timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT c.name, c.slug, COUNT(p.id) as post_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.category_id = c.id AND p.status = 'published' GROUP BY c.name, c.slug ORDER BY post_count DESC
SELECT username, email, role, is_active, last_login_at::timestamp(0), created_at::date FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT LEFT(task_id, 12) as task_id, old_status, new_status, changed_by, LEFT(reason, 60) as reason, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM task_status_history WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT email, status, source, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM newsletter_subscribers WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Tasks waiting for human review

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(task_id, 12) as task_id, LEFT(topic, 60) as topic, quality_score, style, tone, created_at::timestamp(0), updated_at::timestamp(0) FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval' ORDER BY updated_at DESC

panels.title: Awaiting Approval

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_settings
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prompt_templates WHERE is_active=true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_stages WHERE enabled=true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_agents WHERE is_active=true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_permissions
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_actions WHERE enabled=true
SELECT key, category, LENGTH(template) as chars, version FROM prompt_templates ORDER BY category, key

SELECT agent_name, resource, action, CASE WHEN allowed AND NOT requires_approval THEN 'ALLOW' WHEN requires_approval THEN 'APPROVAL' ELSE 'DENY' END as access FROM agent_permissions ORDER BY agent_name, resource
SELECT name, agent_type, trust_level, is_active FROM system_agents ORDER BY trust_level DESC

title: System Health
description: Merged system-health + infrastructure-data. Top section gives core service status + pipeline-level signals; bottom section is the full infrastructure detail (DB tables, hardware metrics, audit log, raw data explorer, system settings).
